name: All Sport Arena
description: All Sport Arena is a place to play pickleball in St. Augustine, FL. There are 4 indoor concrete and acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, trainers or lessons, youth programming, water, restrooms, and a pro shop or equipment store. You can reserve the courts.

name: Bannon Lakes
description: Come play pickleball at Bannon Lakes in St. Augustine, FL! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Bluegreen Vacations Grande Villas At World Golf Village
description: Come play pickleball at Bluegreen Vacations Grande Villas At World Golf Village in Picolata, FL! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Brown Family YMCA
description: Brown Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Ponte Vedra Beach, FL. There are 8 hard and wood courts. 5 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, and water.
fees: Members only — Visiting YMCA members will have an additional fee to play.

name: Old Coast Pickleball Club
description:
Welcome to Old Coast Pickleball! 🏓🌴

Located in the heart of St. Augustine, Florida, Old Coast Pickleball is where community meets competition! With our two pristine indoor courts, we provide a welcoming space for players of all levels to rally, smash, and dink their way to fun and fitness. Whether you're a seasoned pro or a newbie looking to learn the ropes, you'll find a warm, inclusive environment and plenty of opportunities to grow your game.

What makes us special? It's the vibe! At Old Coast Pickleball, we’re all about fun, friendship, and fierce rallies. Join us for casual open play, skill-based leagues, clinics to sharpen your skills, or exciting tournaments that keep the energy high. Plus, our convenient indoor setting means you can play rain or shine!

We’re more than just a club — we’re a community. Come for the pickleball, stay for the people. Let’s play, connect, and create memories together at Old Coast Pickleball! 🎉💪
